programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Cattle baron Oat Jackford orders his two cowboys to run Lucas McCain and his son off their ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are returning from a big cattle sale when the stage is robbed by three outlaws. Lucas, desperate to recover the money that was stolen, is determined to pursue the outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gets in trouble when he accuses the foreman of a neighboring ranch of rustling some of his cattle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Argentine family moves to North Fork. The townspeople are unfriendly to them, making fun of their clothing and customs. The Argentinean adult immigrant is openly hostile in return.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find themselves exposed to anthrax after they adopt a stray horse whose owner has been killed in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After the end of the Civil War, General Phil Sheridan, who has been appointed Governor of the New Mexico Territory, is on an inspection tour of the country.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous gunfighter marries and decides to retire. He and his wife settle down in North Fork and open a store, but three outlaws arrive in town looking to best him in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas McCain's, a traveling photographer, comes to North Fork plying his trade. When a murder is committed, the photographer is accused of the crime.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The townsfolk of North Fork decide to give a young couple a shivaree celebration. When the drunken crowd gets out of hand and roughs up the bride-to-be, the young groom challenges them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade Indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sid Fallon tries to blackmail former gambler Julia Andueza into allowing him to use her boarding house as a gambling hall and saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case where the first witness was killed before he could testify, and the killer is still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaw Sam Morley falls in love with a young woman who has a serious illness and asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward and use the money to pay for her medical care.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas welcomes his old friend Tom Birch, who once saved his life, unaware that the man is now a bank robber on the run with his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Maury, released from Yuma prison, arrives in North Fork intent on getting even with Marshal Torrance, who helped send him to jail.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark McCain is eager to help lawman Jay Jefferson, who has arrived in North Fork intent on killing an outlaw for the reward, whether he is the right man or not.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas comes to the rescue when escaped convicts hold up the general store in North Fork and take Marshall Torrance hostage.

programme.desc: Old Ben, who is able to transform himself into anything, tries to help a crippled little girl.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: David Gurney wakes up to find that no one - his wife, his co-workers, his best friend, not even his own mother knows him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An astronaut declares himself a god when his ship lands on a planet populated by people smaller than ants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Oliver Crangle is a bitter, prejudiced man. Through unknown means, he intends to shrink every evil person in the world at four o'clock.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A loud-mouthed braggart's boasts attract the attention of some aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An elderly couple visit the New Life Corporation, hoping to transport their personalities into youthful artificial bodies.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An alien who crash-lands into a remote mountain village stirs up the villagers' fears and animosity, but he befriends a little boy and gives him a mysterious present.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A ventriloquist is convinced that his dummy, Willie, is alive and evil. He makes plans for a new act with a new dummy: plans that Willie doesn't support!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a newlywed couple briefly returns to the groom's childhood home, the ties of the past prove too strong to resist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A widower buys a robot grandmother for his three children.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Cavender, an angel trying to win his wings, tries to help down-on-her-luck Agnes, who has just been fired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An elderly private school teacher wonders if his life has meant anything as he contemplates suicide on Christmas Eve and is reminded by former students that he has, indeed, had an impact on their lives.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A scientist creates an android that has the qualities which he feels he's lacking.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A US naval destroyer investigates a mysterious tapping sound coming from a sunken submarine.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A reporter finds himself trapped in a small town where the people have extraordinary powers.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Vollmer, a small-time neo-Nazi, takes advice from a shadowy benefactor on how to increase his followers.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A 12-year-old girl who lost her parents in a fire doesn't speak because she has grown up in a secret telepathic community.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A three-man spacecraft lands on a planet only to discover the wreckage of a spacecraft identical to their own.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Strand has a hard time coming to terms with Madison's decisions, while the situation at the stadium takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Madison's decision to help an adversary has unintended consequences; John Dorie's life hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Madison fights to preserve the life she worked so hard to build; Morgan tries to do the right thing.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Morgan tries to help Alicia and the fractured group of survivors as a storm brews.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Alicia's forced to reckon with an agonizing past while seeking refuge from a storm.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Morgan's journey is derailed by some new acquaintances.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: June helps when Al's health deteriorates; Morgan searches for friends lost in the storm.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Strand and Dorie are marooned; Luciana aids a man in need; the group's efforts to help a stranger put everyone in danger.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Difficult decisions lead the group into uncertainty; Alicia delivers on a promise to Charlie.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group's hope falters as they seek a way out; Alicia and Charlie reunite with friends.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Morgan struggles to find the strength to help friends in dire need before it's too late.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group lives a more peaceful life at the prison and strives to hold onto humanity; problems arise when Rick encounters a new survivor.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Facing a new enemy, Rick abandons his quiet lifestyle so that he and the others can fight to protect their hard-won livelihood.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A group leaves the prison to search for supplies; the remaining members of the group deal with recent losses.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and a small group set out on foot in search of medicine, but their mission faces obstacles; Rick and Carol find two uninfected stragglers in a nearby town.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Assorted enemies pressure Rick and the group; the survivors and the prison may reach a breaking point.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick regresa a Alexandria, donde el ánimo está decaído por la presencia de la horda de zombis y las secuelas del asalto sufrido. Maggie y Aaron salen en busca de Glenn. Denise pierde la confianza en sí misma, pero Tara la anima.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl se separa de Abraham y Sasha mientras regresan a Alexandria. Un trío de fugitivos captura a Daryl, aunque él trata de convencerlos de que se unan a su comunidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Glenn encuentra a Enid y la convence de regresar junto a él a Alexandria. Mientras, en la comunidad, Ron roba armas del arsenal y Carol se enfrenta a Morgan porque no confía en él.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La horda de zombis invade Alexandria a través de la grieta que se produjo en el muro. Rick, Michonne, Carl, Gabriel y Deanna se ocultan en la casa de Jessie, pero se dan cuenta de que están rodeados.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Ahora que los caminantes han traspasado las barreras de Alexandría, Rick y los otros sobrevivientes deben seguir luchando para mantenerse a salvo e intentar no perder la esperanza.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo cree que estar en el lado de los vivos trae responsabilidades que van más allá de la supervivencia. Desde esta perspectiva, Rick comienza una lucha consigo mismo para preservar las huellas de lo que queda de humanidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de Rick acompaña a Jesus a su comunidad, La Cumbre. Allí, un residente intenta matar a Gregory, el líder, por órdenes de Negan. Maggie hace un pacto con Gregory: matarán a Negan a cambio de la mitad de las provisiones que guardan.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Un nuevo enemigo amenaza la paz en Alexandria y Rick y el grupo deciden que la única manera de vencerlo es combatir.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tras haber obtenido un éxito menor, algunos de los miembros del grupo han sido hechos prisioneros por sus nuevos enemigos y el resto de los supervivientes de Alexandria tendrá que tratar de liberarlos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Abraham abandona a Eugene durante una misión porque él le dice que no necesita su protección. Daryl, Rosita y Denise se topan con un grupo de los Salvadores, dirigidos por Dwight, y entre los dos bandos se produce un tiroteo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol desaparece de Alexandria y toda la comunidad se coordina para localizarla. Sin embargo, lo que algunos de ellos encuentran no es lo que andaban buscando.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Para salvar a Maggie, que se encuentra enferma, el grupo de Rick se aventura fuera de los muros de Alexandria. Pero los hombres de Negan los están esperando en la carretera.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Se descubre contra quién ha ejecutado Negan su venganza. Después, lleva a Rick a hacer un viaje que este no olvidará jamás, con la intención de mostrarle hasta dónde llega su poder y cómo va a cambiar la vida de todos los protagonistas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol y Morgan son conducidos hasta una comunidad que parece segura y bien abastecida. Todo resulta tan idílico, que la desconfianza ante lo que están presenciando aflora en ellos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Negan mantiene a Daryl encerrado en una celda, pero le propone que se someta a él y pasará a disfrutar de los privilegios de los que gozan los suyos. Se descubre el pasado de Dwight y por qué tiene la cara desfigurada.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los miembros del grupo de Alexandria están desmoralizados debido a los trágicos acontecimientos que acaban de ocurrir, pero al mismo tiempo deben prepararse para el encuentro con Negan. Éste llega antes de lo previsto y les arrebata las armas.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon struggle to bring to justice a weirdly garbed, artillery-equipped gang of bank robbers.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A murderer trapped by agent James T. West breaks out of prison with a bizarre plan to assassinate him.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent West is attacked while guarding a precious cargo of smallpox vaccine and loses his memory from a blow on the head.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: Shakur Stevenson vs Oscar Valdez
programme.desc: On April 30th, 2022, Shakur Stevenson fought Oscar Valdez for the WBC and WBO World Super Featherweight Titles at MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Shakur put on a brilliant performance, outmatching Valdez on his way to a clear unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Shakur Steveson vs Felix Caraballo
programme.desc: On June 9th, 2020, a young Shakur Stevenson fought Felix Caraballo in a super featherweight bout in The Bubble at MGM Grand. After knocking down Caraballo in rounds 1 and 6, Stevenson would get the KO with a devastating body shot in round six.

programme.title: Shane Mosley vs Antonio Margarito
programme.desc: On January 24th, 2009 Shane Mosley and Antonio Margarito fought for WBA Super World Welterweight title at the Staples Center in Los Angeles with what was supposed to be a 12 round bout only went nine resulting in a victory for Mosley.

programme.title: Shane Mosley vs Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: On June 17th, 2000 Shane Mosley faced Oscar De la Hoya for the first time for the IBA and WBC World welterweight titles at the Staples Center in Los Angeles the bout went a full 12 rounds ending with a split decision win for Mosley.

programme.title: Shane Mosley vs Oscar De La Hoya 2
programme.desc: On September 13th, 2003 Shane Mosley and Oscar De La Hoya battled for a second time for the IBA, WBA and, WBC Super welterweight titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that lasted 12 rounds continuing the reign of Mosley securing his win.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Ayub Kalule
programme.desc: On June 25th, 1981 Sugar Ray Leonard faced Ayub Kalule for the WBA World Super Welterweight title at the Astrodome in Houston that ended by technical knockout in the ninth round giving Leonard the win.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Davey Boy Green
programme.desc: On March 31st, 1980 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Davey Boy Green for the WBC World Welterweight titles at the Capitol Center in Landover in a bout that went 4 out of 15 rounds ending with a knockout victory for Leonard.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Marvin Hagler
programme.desc: On April 6th, 1987 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Marvin Hagler for the WBC World Middleweight title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas in a twelve round bout that resulted in a split decision in favor of Leonard.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Thomas Hearns
programme.desc: On September 16th, 1981 Sugar Ray Leonard faced Thomas Hearns for the WBA and WBC World welterweight titles at the Caesars Palace in Las Vegas resulting in a win by technical knockout for Leonard and went on to be the 1981 Fight of the year.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Wilfred Benitez
programme.desc: On November 30th, 1979 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Wilfred Benitez for the WBC World Welterweight title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas that went 15 rounds but ended in technical knockout giving the victory to Leonard.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs Pedro Campa
programme.desc: On August 13th, 2022, Teofimo Lopez fought Pedro Campa for the NABF & WBO International Super Lightweight Titles in Las Vegas. Teofimo looked confident and quick from the start, wearing down Campa until he finally stopped him in the 7th round.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs Vasiliy Lomachenko
programme.desc: On October 17th, 2020 Teofimo Lopez and Vasiliy Lomachenko battled for IBF, WBA and WBO World Lightweight title in The Bubble at MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a 12 round bout that ended in victory for Lopez.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs William Silva
programme.desc: On July 14th, 2018 Teofimo Lopez and William Silva fought for the vacant WBC Continental Americas lightweight titles with Silva going down 3 times Lopez secured the technical knockout win in the sixth round.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Andre Gorges
programme.desc: On April 14th, 2012 Terence Crawford fought Andre Gorges at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas in a bout that was set for 6 round and lasted 5 with a win by knockout victory for Crawford.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Jose Benavidez Jr
programme.desc: On October 13th, 2018, Terence Crawford fought Jose Benavidez Jr for the WBO World Welterweight Title in Omaha, Nebraska. In a dominant performance, Crawford showed out in front of his hometown, delivering a TKO in the final round.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Julius Indongo
programme.desc: On August 19th, 2017 Terence Crawford fought Julius Indongo for the IBF, WBA, WBC and WBO World Super Lightweight titles at the Pinnacle Bank Arena in Lincoln the bout ended in the third round by knockout securing the victory for Crawford.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Kell Brook
programme.desc: On November 14th, 2020 Terence Crawford battled Kell Brook for the WBO World Welterweight title in The Bubble at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas resulting in a fourth round technical knockout victory for Crawford.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Shawn Porter
programme.desc: On November 20th, 2021, Terence Crawford fought Shawn Porter for the WBO World Welterweight Title at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas. In a very close fight, Crawford turned it up and put on the pressure late, delivering a TKO in the 10th round.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Rafael appears to be creating an opening for the Pharaoh's counterattack, but Rafael has even more dreadful displays of terror in mind.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Rafael calls forth Guardian Dreadscythe, a ravaging reaper that can never be defeated.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After discovering the location of Dartz's secret base, our heroes are on their way to stop Dartz once and for all. Can they reach Dartz before he resurrects the lethal Grand Dragon Leviathan from its millennial slumber?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Dartz's secrets are finally revealed! As the answers to the most puzzling questions are exposed, the Pharaoh and Kaiba realize how much is at stake.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Dartz plants the souls of our captured heroes into Mirror Knights to use them as puppets to fight the Pharaoh and Kaiba.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Dartz summons the thundering Orichalcos Shunoros to pound the Pharaoh and Kaiba into pancakes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba's soul has been captured, leaving the Pharaoh all alone to fend for himself against the invincible forces of Dartz and the Orichalcos! Will his friends reach out from the beyond to give him one last fighting chance?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The gateway opens for the final endgame as the world-devourer Grand Dragon Leviathan and the legendary Atlantis rise out of its watery grave!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: All the monsters of Earth join forces with the survivors of the monster domain for an epic showdown against Grand Dragon Leviathan!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Grand Dragon Leviathan's thunderous roars unleash hundred-foot tall waves worldwide! How can Yugi stop the annihilation of the planet?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and the gang have saved the world from Dartz and his Grand Dragon Leviathan, but they're about to face their biggest challenge yet.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is trapped inside the Duel Dome, and the only way to escape is by defeating the Duel Computer, programmed with the skills of the world's top duelists. Since the Duel Computer has access to thousands of cards, how can Yugi win?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the start of the KC Grand Championship! Sixteen of the world's greatest duelists vie for a chance to challenge Yugi as the King of Games!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: How does Apdnarg Otum know all of Joey's strategies? How can Joey stop Apdnarg when he gathers his ancient cards to unleash the fiercest monster from the great past? But the biggest mystery... how can Joey not know who Apdnarg Otum is?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the second match of the KC Grand Championship as Rebecca faces the kung-fu kicking Asia champion Vivian Wong. However, there's more at stake than just winning the duel - Yugi's heart is on the line, whether he likes it or not.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The first round is over, leaving eight duelists to compete for the right to face Yugi for the KC Grand Championship. Unfortunately for Joey, his next opponent is Zigfried Lloyd, who defeated both Weevil and Rex Raptor in one turn.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Zigfried activates Ride of the Valkyries, the same card that defeated both Weevil and Rex Raptor at the same time.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In the semifinals of the KC Grand Championship, it's a duel between child prodigies as Rebecca faces Leon Wilson and his fairy tale faction.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi finds Grandpa's kidnapper, but is it really a kidnapping? While Yugi unravels the truth, Rebecca starts to unravel when her dragons fall prey to Leon's fervent fables. Rebecca must think of a new plan quickly or there will be no happy ending.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's Zigfried vs. Leon for the right to challenge Yugi in the KC Grand Championship Finals... but Kaiba stops the duel!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a battle between Zigfried and Kaiba. Zigfried quickly gains the advantage by destroying Kaiba's monsters before he can even draw them!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's Yugi vs. Leon for the title of King of Games at the KC Grand Championship! Something sinister lurks in the shadows, for this duel is more than just getting the crown. Zigfried's greatest revenge will commence as his real plan is unleashed.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Leon is Zigfried's younger brother, and he'll avenge his family's loss. Leon's fairy tales are giving Yugi nightmares but the worst is yet to come as Leon has Zigfried's mysterious and special card.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Golden Castle of Stromberg is infecting the world's Duel Disks with a virus that will destroy KaibaCorp. If Yugi doesn't destroy the card, the virus program can't be stopped.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The gang goes on an exotic trip to India, but when their plane crashes in a deserted forest, their vacation turns into a dangerous game of survival.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Realizing that they've become part of a real-life version of the Capsule Monsters board game, the gang struggles to find a way out.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Reunited at last, Yugi and his friends rejoice. But their celebration is soon interrupted by a pack of man-eating wolves, a giant turtle, and an angry Genie!

programme.title: Victorious: Tori Gets Stuck
programme.desc: Tori Gets Stuck: Tori is excited when she gets cast as the lead in the school play, but she has to deal with her very unhappy understudy… Jade. Tori has to avoid Jade's constant sabotage so she can perform on opening night.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori Tortures Teacher
programme.desc: The kids take Sikowitz to the theater to celebrate his ten-year teaching anniversary, but the play's subject sends Sikowitz into a deep depression. Tori must cheer him up.

programme.title: Victorious: Jade Gets Crushed
programme.desc: Andre spends time with Jade working on a song and develops a crush on her. Tori tries to help him get over his crush, but nothing seems to work, and Andre has trouble keeping his feelings a secret.

programme.title: Victorious: Who Did it to Trina?
programme.desc: Trina stars in Tori's directorial debut, and there is a big accident on opening night. Lane wants to find out what went wrong. Everyone thinks it was an equipment malfunction, maybe it's sabotage.

programme.title: Victorious: Beggin' On Your Knees
programme.desc: Beggin' On Your Knees: The Full Moon Jam is coming up. The cutest boy in school wants to perform a duet with Tori, but she finds out he has a reputation. Is Tori just having trust issues, or is this guy bad news?

programme.title: Victorious: Ice Cream for Ke$ha
programme.desc: Tori has to be Trina's assistant for a month. The only way Trina will call off the bet is if Tori wins a private Ke$ha concert. Tori's friends try to save Tori and hopefully score a Ke$ha concert!

programme.title: Victorious: Prom Wrecker
programme.desc: Tori rallies the gang into having prom at Hollywood Arts, but the event ruins Jade's art project, and now she's out for revenge. Can Tori throw a successful prom, with Jade aiming to bring the whole dance down?

programme.title: Victorious: Terror on Cupcake Street
programme.desc: The kids have to build a float fast. They only have a night to drive the float to the parade. When the float breaks down in a bad neighborhood, can the kids recover and save their chance to be on TV?

programme.title: Victorious: A Christmas Tori
programme.desc: The kids have to find the perfect Secret Santa gifts for each other, because whoever gives the worst gift has to go door-to-door yodeling with Sikowitz!

programme.title: Victorious: The Breakfast Bunch
programme.desc: Tori and the gang are forced to spend a Saturday in detention after a lunch trip gone wrong. They have the whole day to learn about each other, find food, and try not to earn more detention.

programme.title: Victorious: The Worst Couple
programme.desc: Jade and Beck help Sinjin with his new game show, "The Worst Couple," but it puts their relationship to the test. Meanwhile, Tori breaks her precious Pear Phone.

programme.title: Victorious: Andre's Horrible Girl
programme.desc: Tori notices some changes in her friend Andre, whose girlfriend seems to be overbearing and controlling. Meanwhile, Jade and Cat try to earn easy money dog-sitting in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Victorious: Car, Rain, & Fire
programme.desc: Cat's favorite actress dies and she talks Tori and Jade into driving to the actress' house to hold a vigil. Meanwhile, Trina directs a play starring herself, with Beck, Andre, and Robbie.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori & Jade's Play Date
programme.desc: Tori and Jade play a married couple putting their acting abilities and uneasy friendship to the test. Meanwhile, Cat & Robbie start a service where they deliver bad news in a friendly way.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly catches a contagious illness and accidentally gets a member of the band, One Direction, sick. Meanwhile, Spencer is stuck training a little girl who dislikes exercising.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: With Sam's help, Gibby opens a secret restaurant in the school's basement. Meanwhile, Spencer designs a security robot for the loft which goes unexpectedly haywire.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly and Spencer are being evicted from their apartment, and the gang reminisces about their time in Bushwell Plaza. Although, their memories may not be quite how we remember them.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Freddie's new dream job becomes a nightmare when Sam gets hired too! Meanwhile, Carly tries to get a clueless guy to ask her out, and Spencer has to volunteer at the local firehouse.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: The iCarly gang celebrate 'Halfoween' because they think Halloween is so great that it should come twice a year! But when Nevel pulls a prank on Carly and her friends, the party spins out of control.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Spencer has a new nemesis - Chuck's more menacing younger brother, Chip! Meanwhile, Freddie fixes Gibby's toy phaser and gives it a power he never imagined!

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly bans T-Bo from the loft, he retaliates by not letting Carly into the Groovy Smoothie. Meanwhile, Freddie and Gibby discover being in a band has many perks and a few drawbacks.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam learns her mom is in a Vegas jail, the gang decides to gather their most prized possessions, drive to Vegas and pawn their stuff to make enough money to bail her out.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Sam's friend gets out of juvy and Sam warns everyone to stay away, but Carly doesn't listen and finds herself in over her head. Back at the loft, Spencer finds a pair of night vision goggles.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam's laptop gets stolen, the iCarly gang tries to help track down the thief.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly wants her dad to escort her to an important dance, but when he can't make it a very sick Spencer tries to help her out. Meanwhile, Sam fixes a motorcycle and Freddie gets a new phone.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: After Jimmy Fallon mentions iCarly on his late night show, the gang does a tribute webcast to him. Jimmy sees it and invites them to New York to appear on his show.
